title: custom function in where clause
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE artists (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT, age INTEGER CHECK (age >= 0));
CREATE TABLE songs (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, title TEXT, artist_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY (artist_id) REFERENCES artists(id));
INSERT INTO artists (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Britney Spears', 41), (2, 'Madonna', 65);
INSERT INTO songs (id, title, artist_id) VALUES (1, 'Toxic', 1), (2, 'Like a Prayer', 2);
SELECT a.name, s.title FROM artists a JOIN songs s ON a.id = s.artist_id WHERE LENGTH(a.name) > LENGTH(s.title) LIMIT 5;
key_bug_features: custom function used in where clause
